reference: Kanaan ƒe viwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye: Sidon, ame si nye eƒe ŋgɔgbevi kple Het.
hypothesis: Kaa nà ƒe viwo dome tɔa da wé nyá? Sidon àme si nyá ƒe gbegbɔ̃ vi kple he.

reference: Kanaan ƒe dzidzimeviwoe nye: Yebusitɔwo, Amoritɔwo, Girgasitɔwo, Hivitɔwo, Arkitɔwo, Sinitɔwo, Arvaditɔwo, Zemaritɔwo kple Hamatitɔwo.

hypothesis: Tele gome ŋgɔ me mama la bɔna. Efa gbenɔi me wó ma nyigba na gbe vu vu awo gblɔ la.

hypothesis: Yoo, tan, pɛɛ, vu, we.

reference: Sem ƒe dzidzimeviwoe nye: Arfaxad, ame si dzi Sela.

reference: Esi ɣeyiɣiawo va le yiyim la, David ɖu Filistitɔwo dzi eye wòbɔbɔ wo ɖe anyi, exɔ Gat kple kɔƒe siwo ƒo xlãe le Filistitɔwo si.

reference: David ɖu Moabtɔwo hã dzi, wozu etenɔlawo eye woxea adzɔga nɛ.
hypothesis: David muatou haji wuzu tenolawoyee ho ajogan

reference: Eɖu Zoba fia, Hadadezer ƒe duwo dzi yi Hamat ke le esime wòyi be yeaɖo yeƒe fiaɖuƒe anyi le Frat tɔsisi la to.
hypothesis: Edo zobafia. Ada deza. Faduojia yi hamad kele e si me oyi be ya do ye fefia nuwo anyile flatosila.

reference: David lé sɔdola akpe adre kple afɔzɔla akpe blaeve , etu ata na sɔawo katã negbe wo dometɔ alafa ɖeka ko.
hypothesis: David la sodola quadra, le afɔzola kple blavo, etua tanasɔwokata na gbe wo do mɛtɔ ala fã de kako.

reference: Esi Aramtɔwo tso Damasko va be yewoakpe ɖe Zoba fia Hadadezer ŋu la, David wu wo dometɔ akpe blaeve-vɔ-eve eye wòda asrafo aɖewo ɖe Aram le Damasko, si nye Aramtɔwo ƒe fiadu la me.
hypothesis: Asi arãm tɔwo tso Damasko. Wabae wua kpe rezoba fia hada dɛzeŋula. Davidi wua wodo me tɔ akpe blave vovo. Ayewo da sra fua da wude arãm le Damasko. Sinya arãm tɔwo pɛ fia du la me.

reference: Ale Aramtɔwo zu David tenɔlawo eye wodzɔa adzɔga nɛ ƒe sia ƒe.
hypothesis: Alerã romtose, David Tono lao. Ayiwojoa ajogane fosia.

reference: Ale Yehowa na David ɖua dzi le afi sia afi si wòyi.
hypothesis: Ale ye wo na da bi dɔwɔɖui la afisi afisi wo.

reference: David tsɔ Fia Hadadezer ƒe aʋakɔwo ƒe amegãwo ƒe sikakpoxɔnuwo va Yerusalem, kpe ɖe akɔbli geɖe tso Hadadezer ƒe du siwo nye Teba kple Kun la me la ŋu.

reference: Esime Hamat fia Tou se be Fia David si Zoba fia Hadadezer ƒe aʋakɔ blibo la, eɖo Via ŋutsu Hadoram ɖe Fia David gbɔ be wòado gbe nɛ, ada ŋkɔ ɖe edzi le eƒe dziɖuɖu ta eye wòatsɔ sika, klosalo kple akɔbli nɛ.
